content:
In 2010-11, while handling certification work for Scan Steels Ltd., Bhubaneswar in New Delhi, a chance conversation with a passenger from Norway on the Delhi Metro became an unexpected lesson in communication.

I’ve always believed that real growth happens when we step outside our comfort zone. That brief exchange strengthened my English fluency and cross-cultural confidence — skills I continue to use in professional interactions today.

Lesson: Don’t underestimate everyday moments. Curiosity and engagement are powerful tools for career growth.
